title: Pastel End Dimension
description: This Minecraft Resource-Pack gives the End dimension a pale, pastel-inspired look while keeping the original vanilla style, creating a softer, cleaner, and more polished atmosphere.
body:
# Overview 
This resource pack transforms the End dimension into a serene, pastel-inspired world while staying true to Minecraft’s vanilla aesthetic. Blocks, plants, and mobs receive soft, muted colors, giving the End a cleaner, more polished look without losing its mysterious charm. Chorus plants, end stone, shulkers, and other iconic elements are subtly reimagined to feel lighter and more harmonious, creating a calmer and more visually pleasing environment. 
## 🎨Visual Design 
(End Stone, End Stone Bricks, Purpur Block, Chorus Flower/Plant), entities like Shulkers, and items such as Chorus Fruit, Popped Chorus Fruit, Shulker Shells, and Shulker Spawn Eggs have been retextured with softer, brighter tones that blend seamlessly into a pastel palette. The entire dimension now feels lighter and more balanced, giving the End a clean, dreamy atmosphere while preserving its signature look and mysterious appeal. 
## 🌅Shader Compatibility 
This pack looks especially stunning when combined with shaders, as the soft pastel tones and smooth textures beautifully complement lighting effects, shadows, and reflections, bringing the End to life like never before. 
### ⚙️Performance and Compatibility
Perfect for players who want a gentle, atmospheric twist on the End without altering gameplay or performance. Fully compatible with vanilla Minecraft and ideal for adventure maps, building projects, or simply exploring the End in a fresh, relaxing style.
